scripts.build: npm run build:public-packages && npm run build -w @pixel-point/aval-certification && npm run build -w @pixel-point/aval-playground && npm run build -w @pixel-point/aval-end-user-playground && npm run build -w @pixel-point/aval-grass-rabbit-example && npm run build -w @pixel-point/aval-grass-rabbit-codecs-example && npm run build -w @pixel-point/aval-kinetic-orb-example
scripts.build:public-packages: npm run build -w @pixel-point/aval-graph && npm run build -w @pixel-point/aval-format && npm run build -w @pixel-point/aval-player-web && npm run build -w @pixel-point/aval-element && npm run build -w @pixel-point/aval-compiler
scripts.compile:grass-rabbit: npm run build:public-packages && npm run compile -w @pixel-point/aval-grass-rabbit-example
scripts.compile:grass-rabbit-codecs: npm run build:public-packages && npm run compile -w @pixel-point/aval-grass-rabbit-codecs-example
scripts.kinetic-orb: npm run build:public-packages && npm run dev -w @pixel-point/aval-kinetic-orb-example --
scripts.compile:kinetic-orb: npm run build:public-packages && npm run compile -w @pixel-point/aval-kinetic-orb-example
scripts.test: npm run test:unit && npm run test:browser
scripts.test:kinetic-orb: npm run build:public-packages && npm run test:kinetic-orb:prebuilt
scripts.api:check: npm run build:public-packages && node scripts/release/run-api-extractor.mjs && node scripts/release/check-api-classification.mjs
scripts.fixtures:verify: npm run build -w @pixel-point/aval-graph && npm run build -w @pixel-point/aval-format && npm run build -w @pixel-point/aval-compiler && node scripts/fixtures/verify-all.mjs
scripts.security:check: node scripts/security/check-lockfile.mjs && node scripts/security/check-workflows.mjs && vitest run --config vitest.m9.config.ts tests/security
scripts.release:publish-dry-run: vitest run --config vitest.m9.config.ts packages/certification/test/publication-ledger.test.ts tests/package/registry-client.test.ts tests/package/registry-reconciler.test.ts tests/package/publication-support.test.ts
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck --workspaces --if-present && npm run typecheck:tests
